final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing screenshot mockup for a Douyin livestream featuring a female host.

Style/medium: mobile UI screenshot mockup, Douyin livestream interface style, photorealistic
Composition: 9:16 vertical frame, full-screen mobile interface, host centered in the live feed area
Subject: elegant female host (inspired by "神仙姐姐" archetype), holding a sign with promotional text, warm and engaging expression
Scene/backdrop: typical livestream room interior with soft ambient lighting, blurred background to keep focus on host
Lighting/mood: warm ring-light illumination on face, soft and flattering, inviting atmosphere
Color palette: warm skin tones, neutral room colors, Douyin interface blues and whites
Text (verbatim): "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"
Constraints: must look like an authentic Douyin livestream screenshot with interface elements (viewer count, comments area, gift buttons)
Avoid: watermark, distorted face, deformed hands, overly saturated colors, 8K stuffer aesthetic
